name: ted@tedcruz.org (private)
subject: Personal message for you [VOICE MAIL]
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend -- please, stop what you are doing right now and listen
to my message?

Friend -- please, stop what you are doing right now and listen
to my message?
The message will expire shortly.

CLICK HERE TO WATCH & LISTEN >>

I hope you will please listen to this right away.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy

The Democrats, trying to extend President Obama's brand of
leadership, are working overtime to install Hillary Clinton in
the White House in 2016, and we don't have much time before the
Federal Election Commission's fundraising deadline on June 30th
-- just under 8 days.

name: Jonathan Slemrod, MarcoRubio.com
subject: 31 days of policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44810310:6jVm4HLNm:m:1:1349778030:D0A1203A6A609AA347DB1B7C7C84E31F:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Marco's campaign is driven by ideas -- the kind of ideas that will make this a New American Century, and revive and expand the American Dream for future generations. He has a whole lot of them, too: In fact, enough to fill 31 days of posts on various policy proposals. This is nothing new for Marco. When he was in the Florida State House, he released a book of 100 innovative policy ideas for the state. Dozens of them became law. His presidential campaign is running on the same kind of fuel, and as President, you can bet he'll achieve the same kind of results. [**Check out all the 31 Days of Policy posts here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44810311:6jVm4HLNm:m:1:1349778030:D0A1203A6A609AA347DB1B7C7C84E31F:r) The final eight:

---
| On each page, you'll find Marco's views and record on a given issue, illustrated through specific policy plans, past op-eds and speeches, explainer videos, media clips, and more. We have a whole range of issues covered: There's **[Marco's innovative, bipartisan proposals for overhauling higher education and bringing down the cost of college](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44810320:6jVm4HLNm:m:1:1349778030:D0A1203A6A609AA347DB1B7C7C84E31F:r)** , **[his ideas for boosting innovation and protecting the sharing economy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44810321:6jVm4HLNm:m:1:1349778030:D0A1203A6A609AA347DB1B7C7C84E31F:r)** , **[his ten-point plan for restoring American strength](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44810322:6jVm4HLNm:m:1:1349778030:D0A1203A6A609AA347DB1B7C7C84E31F:r)** , and much more. I'm proud to be working for a candidate who believes in the power of ideas. I hope you feel the same way about supporting him. Jonathan SlemrodPolicy DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Chris Christie
subject: Give me a podium and I'll be there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
I've said since the beginning that it doesn't matter what debate stage I'm on. Give me a podium and I'll be there, anytime, anywhere.

Peter, I'm ready, are you? [**Chip in $15, $25 or even $50 now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44811827:J1dHOHLCN:m:1:1516426255:62AC0586F26EB75809DA128272E69C9A:r) and let's continue to talk about the real issues and not concern ourselves with those that don't matter, such as the time and place of a debate podium.

Thank you for your continued support.
Chris

name: Sen. Rand Paul
subject: A Personal Note From Rand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
I was talking with my wife Kelley this morning and we were
discussing the past week on the campaign trail, and the upcoming
debate.
She thought I should send a note to my
supporters with the same points that I was making to her. She
thought you needed to hear it straight from me before before this
critical debate. So I penned this note this afternoon and wanted
to get it to you right away. I hope you agree with this approach.
More updates to come later!
___
11/9/15
2:29 PM

Dear Supporter -
Last week was a big week on the campaign.

The Senate passed in the dead of night a bill
to raid social security and add trillions to our debt - they gave
President Obama a blank check, and hardly even debated the topic.
I stood up on the floor at 3am and protested.
I might have been a bit fired up, as you
saw if you watched the speech.
With your help, and the help of Senator Mike
Lee, 25 million people watched the video. It went viral and
Americans took notice.
Next, I went to the Democrat debate in South
Carolina and challenged Hillary Clinton head on for being a
NeoCon. She shares the positions on foreign policy of Marco
Rubio, John McCain, and Lindsey Graham.
After watching the Democrats debate, it
became clear there really isn't much difference between Hillary
Clinton and some of the Republican candidates on the key issues.

Hillary Clinton wants Amnesty. Marco
Rubio partnered with Chuck Schumer to try and pass Amnesty.
Hillary Clinton agrees with Marco Rubio
that we should have American boots on the ground in the Middle
East. They both supported the Iraq War, support a no fly zone
over Syria that could lead to war with Russia, supported failed
policies in Libya, etc. They both support foreign aid to the
Muslim brotherhood. There is virtually no substantive
difference between them on foreign policy.
Hillary Clinton supports Obamatrade.
Again, most of the Republican candidates, including Marco Rubio,
agree with her on that. They want to give President Obama more
authority, and trust him to use it correctly.

There is virtually no difference between
Hillary Clinton and several other Republican candidates on some
of the biggest issues of the campaign. How can you beat Hillary
Clinton if you agree with her policies?
The debate is tomorrow night and we are down
to just 8 candidates on that stage.

Click here to show your support of my
campaign by donating $25 instantly.
It is by far the most important debate of the
campaign.
And now rather than talk about Ben Carson's
college applications, or Marco Rubio's credit card scandal, we
can talk about the real issues facing our country.

No American boots on the ground in the
Middle East.
A fairer, flatter tax to replace the tax
code.
Audit the fed to provide real confidence
in our money.
No Amnesty. Not now, not ever.

We each get more time to speak because only 8
candidates will be on the stage….this means more time to
discuss the issues that truly matter. And I trust Fox Business
will do a better job staying on the issues than CNBC.
I am going to "paint in bold colors, not
pale pastels."
And I am going to hold these Republican
candidates accountable for being Hillary-lite on the critical
issues of our day.
If you agree with this approach, I hope you
will join me by making a contribution to the campaign. Together,
we will take our country back.
Sincerely,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: (Video Included) First Look: New Hampshire TV Ads
body:
Inside: first TV ad featuring Senator John McCain. | |

---
---
|

Friend - I have big news! Our campaign has just released our first television and radio ads in the early voting state of New Hampshire. I wanted to make sure you were one of the first to know about them.

**The ads feature two-time New Hampshire Presidential Primary winner, Senator John McCain.**

In the ads, Senator McCain describes what we need in our next Commander-in-Chief; the kind of experience and knowledge only Senator Graham possesses. Speaking from experience, he shares his appreciation for the role the people of New Hampshire play in choosing our nominee.

[**You can watch the television ad by clicking this link right now. I hope after you watch the ad, you will make a donation to Senator Graham's campaign to ensure we have the funds needed to keep this ad on the air!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31531803:s4fBfkynN:m:1:877327319:AE4E5A91E2F07CDA71D4EE81208B928D:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31531803:s4fBfkynN:m:1:877327319:AE4E5A91E2F07CDA71D4EE81208B928D:r)

Friend, we need your help to make sure all voters in the critical state of New Hampshire see our first TV ad. [**Please make an instant online donation right now to help keep these ads on the air and to tell Senator Graham that you stand with him at this pivotal moment of the campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31531803:s4fBfkynN:m:1:877327319:AE4E5A91E2F07CDA71D4EE81208B928D:r)

Thanks,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

**P.S. Every donation received from this email will go immediately towards keeping our ads on the air in New Hampshire.** **[Please follow this link right now to give as generously as you can afford.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31531803:s4fBfkynN:m:1:877327319:AE4E5A91E2F07CDA71D4EE81208B928D:r)** **Thank you for your continued support of Senator Graham!**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31531803:s4fBfkynN:m:1:877327319:AE4E5A91E2F07CDA71D4EE81208B928D:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Sen. Rand Paul
subject: A Follow Up Note From Rand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
I sent a personal note this afternoon that seems to have gotten
some attention.

The establishment was surprised that I
compared Marco Rubio to Hillary Clinton.
Other candidates may want to talk about Marco
Rubio's use of the Florida Republican Party credit card. I think
we should stay focused on the issues. And on the issues there are
far too many similarities between Marco Rubio and Hillary
Clinton.

The fact is that Rubio teamed up with
liberals on immigration. He worked with the Hillary wing of the
Democratic party -- Senators Chuck Schumer and Harry Reid -- to
introduce what has become a forgotten piece of terrible
legislation: the "Gang of 8" amnesty bill.

The fact is that Rubio agrees with
Hillary Clinton, John McCain, and Lindsey Graham on putting
American boots on the ground in the Middle East, and other
foreign policy issues including Obama and Hillary's destabilizing
wars in Libya and Syria. He may use rhetoric that challenges
her, but substantively they stand together.

Click here to show your support of my
campaign by donating $25 instantly.
The media - the debate moderators - haven't
held Rubio accountable for his past support for Amnesty, or
compared his foreign policy positions to Hillary Clinton.
But we are going to continue to hold him
accountable. These issues matter to the American people, they
matter to the cause of Liberty, and we are going to need to
'paint with bold colors, not pale pastels' if we intend to defeat
Hillary Clinton in November.
I hope you will join me.
Are you with me?
In liberty,
Rand

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 11/09
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For
body:
Monday, November 9, 2015

This week, Senator Rand Paul led the fight against the debt
ceiling increase by filibustering the deal, where his speech
generated over 24 million views online. As a fiscal conservative,
he objected to the deal because it continued to put us further in
debt and spent money that we don't have.

Senator Paul continues to grow his Presidential bid through
strong organization. Our campaign is the first to to fill all 99
county chairs in Iowa. Due to Senator Paul's recent success in
national polls, he was invited to the main debate stage to
Tuesday's Fox Business Channel Debate. Rand is poised for a
strong debate performance next week, so make sure to tweet your
support, pictures and favorite moments using #StandWithRand.

Doug Stafford

Chief Strategist

Rand Paul for President

News of the Week

Rand Paul Campaign Touts
Ground Game

Seated at long tables in a
mostly empty office suite on a Monday evening, about 30 staffers
and volunteers for Rand Paul's presidential campaign paused from
a phone bank session for a pep talk from the boss. Chip
Englander, the national campaign manager, told them he loved the
movie "Glengarry Glen Ross." His brand of persuasion, however,
wasn't the edgy, profanity-laced hard sell that characterized the
Hollywood version of a Wall Street boiler room. He wasn't
selling stocks or futures, but an idea that has driven thousands
of volunteers in hundreds of bare-bones headquarters over decades
of caucus campaigns. The message: Polls don't matter. It's
ground organization that wins campaigns. "You guys are the key
piece in all of this," Englander said.

What Made America Great?

I'll give you a hint-it
wasn't free stuff. It wasn't free education. It wasn't free
healthcare. It was the freedom to thrive-the freedom to be left
alone. America is the land people set sail for-to get away from
big government, to find freedom, to make their fortune. We have
to first understand what made America great before we can even
think about influencing the rest of the world.
Some candidates for
President like Hillary Clinton and Sen. Marco Rubio think we
should spread American style-freedom and democracy around the
world.

Rand Paul Goes Viral,
Thanks to Mike Lee

Rand Paul's late-night
budget deal filibuster bid picked up an unexpected boost from
fellow Republican Sen. Mike Lee of Utah. Lee posted to his
Facebook page a clip of the Kentucky presidential hopeful
expressing on the Senate floor his opposition to the budget deal,
which also suspended the debt limit beyond the 2016 elections.
"The mainstream media did not want to tell the truth about what
was in this budget deal. But in the era of social media, you can
no longer hide votes for bad policy in the middle of the night,"
Lee said in a statement. "The American people will find out."
Rather than engaging in a prolonged oration as he's done before,
Paul spoke a couple of times at much shorter length during the
deal's debate. The segment of Paul raising a point of order
that the agreement, which was signed into law Monday, broke the
budget rules, was viewed more than 18 million times by Monday
afternoon.

Featured Video

Rand Paul Supporter Endorsement Video

Want to be in our next endorsement video? Click
here to tell us why you stand with Rand!

Photos from the Week

Featured Event

Rand Paul Filing for
President in New Hampshire - Concord, NH

Join Senator Rand Paul as
he officially files for office in New Hampshire. Don't miss this
exciting moment in history!

Volunteer of the Week

Daphne Lee

Nevada

Daphne is the Clark County
Co-Chair in Nevada and has made over 500 phone calls in support
of Rand Paul for President this week. She is an advocate for
smaller government and has helped lead the fight against the
NDAA, which strips Americans rights to due process.

Featured Store Product

Supporter Designed Bumper
Stickers

$15.00/each

Order your Rand
Paul bumper stickers, designed by supporters during our bumper
sticker submission contest!

Quote of the Week

Post this to your Instagram

On your phone, tap and hold, click Save
Image, then post to your Instagram with hashtag #StandwithRand

Tweet of the Week

Retweet and follow @RandPaul on
Twitter!

Paid For By Rand Paul For
President

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, yesterday marked exactly One-Year-Out from Election Day 2016--365 days left to continue to grow our grassroots movement here in Maryland and across the country so we can turn the Senate blue!

I'm proud to have such a strong network of grassroots supporters, and I am grateful to have the support of so many people who are part of our movement for positive change.

[**So here's the challenge: We need your help to keep building that movement. Please help us meet our goal of getting 1,000 donations before our November 10th budget deadline.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c77/70cdc2ba/47b264b5/39664ac/4270915213/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oneyearoutcvh?refcode=110915_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+So+heres+the+challenge+We+need+your+help&utm_campaign=em110915_1&source=em110915_1")

It's an honor for me to be on the frontlines of the important policy fights in Congress, because I know how important these issues are to Maryland families. While we fight for progress on the major challenges of our time, we must continue to confront powerful special interests on issues both large and small.

For example, years ago, lobbyists slipped a provision into federal law that prevented local governments from passing laws to protect consumers against predatory auto-towing -- an abusive practice that has forced unsuspecting consumers to make big payments to get their cars back. I am pleased to report that last week, Congress passed my amendment to restore the power of local communities to protect consumers.

Taking on the powerful special interests -- whether the NRA or big Wall Street hedge funds -- requires a grassroots army to build a movement for change.

[**That's why I need your help now. I hope you will be one of our 1,000 activists who will donate to the movement for change!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c77/70cdc2ba/47b264b5/39664ad/4270915213/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oneyearoutcvh?refcode=110915_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+I+need+your+help+now+I+hope+yo&utm_campaign=em110915_1&source=em110915_1")

-Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c77/70cdc2ba/47b264b5/39664aa/4270915213/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em110915_1&source=em110915_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: taking a break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| I wanted to take a quick break from prepping for tomorrow's Fox Business debate to reach out to you, Friend.

The American worker is what makes this country great. And, as I prepare for tomorrow's debate, I keep thinking about how Obama's disastrous policies have stalled any hope for opportunity that they work for. Even worse, I think of how a continuation of those policies would quash the American Dream as we know it. We can't let that happen.

That's why I'm asking for your help, Friend. As I work to have a strong showing at the debate, I'm also turning to you to help bring our fight to the Washington Establishment head on.

**[Can you contribute $25, $50, or $100 to the cause so we can keep up the momentum going into tomorrow?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3D20151109-s-email%26amount%3D50&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=1)**

Thanks -- now, it's time for me to get back to work!

-Rick

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=2) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=3) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=4), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=5), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=6).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151109_s&n=7)

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: This is a Joyful Campaign???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44819808:JSDR1hLCN:m:1:1349778030:F096FDD5A21C578625C28E78659C1F00:r)
---
| | | | Peter, A story just broke tonight in the New York Times that revealed Jeb Bush's Super PAC's Plan to attack Marco. They write:
---
| "The group's chief strategist has boasted of his willingness to spend as much as $20 million to damage Mr. Rubio's reputation and halt his sudden ascent in the polls"
---
| You read that right. **Jeb's plan is to spend $20 million dollars to "damage Mr. Rubio's reputation."** Not just talk about how they differ on the issues but to actively try to destroy Marco's reputation. And they're bragging about that? How is that the kind of "joyful" campaign that Jeb claimed he wanted to run?!?! [**Our campaign is preparing to fight back, but without your immediate support with a donation of $25 or more by clicking right here right now it won't be sufficient.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44819809:JSDR1hLCN:m:1:1349778030:F096FDD5A21C578625C28E78659C1F00:r) Jeb Bush helped raise $100 million for this Super PAC. They will outspend us. That's just a fact. Marco didn't inherit a national network of wealthy, well-connected donors. _**It get's better. Jeb's Super PAC has even produced a video claiming that Marco is too Pro-Life!!!**_ Honestly, it's something we'd expect from Hillary and the mainstream media, but the fact that the Republican establishment believes this is what they need to do to take down Marco is astonishing. We have to get Marco's back and help him stand strong against this desperate move. [**Click here to donate $25 immediately to let Marco know you're on his team.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44819809:JSDR1hLCN:m:1:1349778030:F096FDD5A21C578625C28E78659C1F00:r) Thanks for your help -- we'll keep you updated as we learn more about these secret plans. Sincerely, Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President P.S. This is even more unbelievable: the Jeb Bush Super PAC is so desperate to try and bring down Marco they've held "focus groups" with voters to zero in on the most damaging attacks. That's what we're up against and that's why Marco urgently needs your support. [**Click here to chip in.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44819809:JSDR1hLCN:m:1:1349778030:F096FDD5A21C578625C28E78659C1F00:r)
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44819809:JSDR1hLCN:m:1:1349778030:F096FDD5A21C578625C28E78659C1F00:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: thinking big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Did you see what the _Washington Post_ said about Chris Van Hollen's Economic Action Plan?

**" The representative's plan is more ambitious than what the White House has in mind... Mr. Van Hollen deserves praise for thinking big about a big issue and for taking aim at the tax code's undue preferences for investment income." **

Seriously, he knows what he's talking about when it comes to economic issues.

Chris is working to level the playing field so all Marylanders can succeed, not just the wealthy few. Chris is fighting for every citizen who's working harder than ever, but still feels stuck in place. His action plan to get the economy of Maryland back up and running is a critical first step--and he needs your help.

**[We need Chris in the Senate. That's why it's so important that we help Chris reach his big One-Year-Out budget deadline goal! Will you chip in right now? We still need 713 donors to step up before Tuesday!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c73/70cdc2ba/47b2c1cf/3966326/3475410662/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oneyearoutcvh?refcode=em1192015&amount=25.00&recurring=12")**

Chris has proven again and again he has what it takes to stand up to the Republican agenda of trickle-down economics and newly selected Speaker Ryan's reckless budget plan that would knock down the ladder of opportunity for millions of Americans.

Every day he does everything he can to help our country succeed. I know Maryland couldn't be better served than with Chris as our next U.S. Senator.

But first, we've got to get him there!

**[Can you help? Just click here and give whatever you can before the deadline tomorrow at midnight. Be one of Chris's 1,000 donors!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c73/70cdc2ba/47b2c1cf/3966326/3475410662/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oneyearoutcvh?refcode=em1192015&amount=25.00&recurring=12")**

Thanks for everything,

Samantha

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c73/70cdc2ba/47b2c1cf/3966327/3475410662/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Claire Sandberg, Bernie 2016
subject: Join the movement in Silver Spring
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
This isn't just a presidential campaign, it's a movement. All across the country, thousands of people are coming together to build the political revolution. And this week -- November 9th through November 15th -- we're having a Week of Action. So if you haven't been to an event yet, now is the time to join in!
**RSVP to attend this event near you, or check out our map for others:**
**What:** Walking & Cleaning Our Environment in Silver Spring
**Where:** Glenmont Metro Station (by the escalators) opposite side of the bus terminal.
12521 Georgia Ave Silver Spring
Silver Spring, MD 20906
**When:** Saturday, November 14th
7:45 am EST
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vj2b)
**For our Week of Action: November 9-15, many Bernie volunteers have planned activities in your community -- everything from debate watch parties and organizing meetings to phone banking and voter registration.**
In this election we know that we will be outspent, but we will not be out-organized. Our strength is in the millions of people who believe in the political revolution -- and who are willing to get involved by showing up to volunteer events.
Don't miss out on this chance to connect with other Bernie supporters near you, and do invaluable work to help elect Bernie.
Join an event for our Week of Action: November 9-15. [**Click here to RSVP.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vj2b)
Want to find other events happening near you? [**Click here to search for more events.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa13/4274868775/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")
It's an honor to be with you in this movement,
Claire Sandberg
Director of Digital Organizing
Bernie 2016
P.S. If you can't make it to an event during our Week of Action, [**support our organizing efforts by making a contribution to our campaign today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa10/4274868775/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em151109attend")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa11/4274868775/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa1e/4274868775/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa1f/4274868775/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2761/43f17890/53df82f7/621eaa1c/4274868775/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Dear Bernie Supporter, This isn't just a presidential campaign, it's a movement. All across the country, thousands of people are coming together to build the political revolution. And this week -- November 9th through November 15th -- we're having a Week of Action. So if you haven't been to an event yet, now is the time to join in! RSVP to attend this event near you, or check out our map for others: What: Walking & Cleaning Our Environment in Silver Spring Where: Glenmont Metro Station (by the escalators) opposite side of the bus terminal. 12521 Georgia Ave Silver Spring Silver Spring, MD 20906 When: Saturday, November 14th 7:45 am EST For our Week of Action: November 9-15, many Bernie volunteers have planned activities in your community -- everything from debate watch parties and organizing meetings to phone banking and voter registration. In this election we know that we will be outspent, but we will not be out-organized. Our strength is in the millions of people who believe in the political revolution -- and who are willing to get involved by showing up to volunteer events. Don't miss out on this chance to connect with other Bernie supporters near you, and do invaluable work to help elect Bernie. Join an event for our Week of Action: November 9-15.
